title: dryopteris lastii
intro: Dryopteris lastii, also known as Last's Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris lastii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a dried powder, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
